choices: An alternate ending of Book 2 or Original Fanfic
1.content:
Earth, Fire, Air and Water.
10,000 years ago, Avatar Korra kept balance between Water Tribes, Earth Kingdom, Fire Nation and Air Nation.
With a Fifth Nation to be the center of Peace and Balance of The World.
The United Republic of nations.

That all Changed when a huge tragedy struck the physical world from the Spirit world.
Vaatu ( The Force of Darkness and Chaos ) has been set free and now, Korra and Vaatu had somehow become one.

When does The rise of Korravaatu begin?
1.title: Starting Intro

15.title: An alternate ending of Book 2 or Original Fanfic

choices: Korra has Raava ripped apart and fused with Vaatu
Vaatu replaces Raava after being freed from Tree of Time
Korra Sacrifices herself to fuse with Vaatu
Vaatu grows within Raava after The battle of Republic city
151.content:
You chose an alternate telling of Book 2 Spirits.
How does the Rise of Korravaatu begin in this?
151.title: Book 2 Au

info.brief_description: Avatar Korra has been turned into a dark avatar. Will she stay that way or find light?
info.description:
Korra has been fused with Vaatu and has been corrupted to become a dark avatar.
This Can take place either in an Au of book 2: Spirits or After The four books.
It is up to you decide whether you can let Korra rule the world for 10,000 years of Darkness or be set free from The Darkness's light.
